title: Stream Zone Sync Node
description: NginxStreamZoneSync schema from NGINX Plus REST API

zones.title: Zone Sync Zones
zones.description: Synchronization information per each shared memory zone.

additionalProperties.title: Sync Zone
additionalProperties.description: Synchronization status of a shared memory zone.

records_pending.description: The number of records that need to be sent to the cluster.

records_total.description: The total number of records stored in the shared memory zone.

status.description: Synchronization information per node in a cluster.

bytes_in.description: The number of bytes received by this node.

msgs_in.description: The number of messages received by this node.

msgs_out.description: The number of messages sent by this node.

bytes_out.description: The number of bytes sent by this node.

nodes_online.description: The number of peers this node is connected to.
